name: nist-rmf-ai
description: NIST AI Risk Management Framework (AI RMF 1.0) compliance server. Provides risk assessment against GOVERN/MAP/MEASURE/MANAGE functions, impact mapping, control generation, trustworthy AI evaluation, and crosswalks to EU AI Act. By MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: assess_risk_profile
tools.description: Assess an AI system against the full NIST AI RMF 1.0 framework.

tools.name: map_ai_impact
tools.description: Map AI system impacts across people, organizations, and ecosystems.

tools.name: generate_risk_controls
tools.description: Generate NIST-aligned control recommendations for identified AI risks.

tools.name: crosswalk_to_eu_ai_act
tools.description: Map NIST AI RMF functions and subcategories to EU AI Act articles.

tools.name: create_risk_report
tools.description: Generate a complete NIST AI RMF compliance report in markdown.

tools.name: check_trustworthy_characteristics
tools.description: Evaluate AI system against NIST's 7 trustworthy AI characteristics.
